name: Swiss Precision Minimal
positioning_match: Premium B2B, finance, architecture, software, and institutional brands.
logo_approach: Geometric wordmark or restrained combination mark with black-and-white discipline.
typography_recipe: One neo-grotesk sans plus one neutral support face with tight hierarchy.
color_architecture: Black, white, graphite, and one controlled accent.
imagery_direction: Crisp, high-contrast, structural, documentary-light.
graphic_system: Grid logic, modular crops, disciplined rules, minimal ornament.
application_translation: Strong in websites, decks, signage, stationery, and sober social templates.

name: Humanist Warm Modern
positioning_match: Healthcare, education, services, and people-first technology.
logo_approach: Soft wordmark or balanced symbol-wordmark with humane proportions.
typography_recipe: Humanist sans with editorial support serif for emphasis.
color_architecture: Soft neutrals with one clear trust color and one warm secondary.
imagery_direction: Natural light, real people, soft contrast, lived-in context.
graphic_system: Rounded containers, gentle modularity, warm spacing rhythm.
application_translation: Strong in care brands, onboarding flows, print collateral, and community touchpoints.

name: Editorial Luxury Serif
positioning_match: Luxury, beauty, hospitality, boutique fashion, and cultural brands.
logo_approach: Elegant wordmark or monogram-led system with sharp contrast details.
typography_recipe: Display serif plus restrained sans for supporting information.
color_architecture: Ivory, black, deep jewel tones, or muted metallic references.
imagery_direction: Cinematic cropping, tactile detail, premium texture, controlled mood.
graphic_system: Editorial margins, dramatic scale contrast, refined framing devices.
application_translation: Strong in packaging, invitations, lookbooks, website hero treatments, and premium stationery.

name: Techno Modular Grid
positioning_match: Developer tools, infrastructure, AI platforms, and future-facing enterprise products.
logo_approach: Modular symbol or engineered wordmark with strong geometry.
typography_recipe: Technical sans with mono support for utility layers.
color_architecture: Dark neutrals, electric accent, and functional secondary signals.
imagery_direction: Abstract data, product UI, systems diagrams, controlled 3D depth.
graphic_system: Modules, rails, alignment fields, encoded patterns, and system labels.
application_translation: Strong in dashboards, docs, product launches, technical decks, and template ecosystems.

name: Cultural Heritage Contemporary
positioning_match: Museums, cultural institutions, local brands, and contemporary craft businesses.
logo_approach: Wordmark or emblem with culturally grounded detail used sparingly.
typography_recipe: Characterful serif or humanist sans with culturally sensitive support choices.
color_architecture: Grounded pigments, natural neutrals, and one culturally resonant accent.
imagery_direction: Material-rich, place-aware, human, and quietly proud.
graphic_system: Pattern fragments, framing motifs, contemporary restraint over folklore overload.
application_translation: Strong in exhibitions, packaging, publications, signage, and place-based collateral.

name: Neo Brutalist Utility
positioning_match: Creator brands, indie media, youth culture, and challenger startups.
logo_approach: Heavy wordmark, blocky symbol, or raw typographic signature.
typography_recipe: One loud display face plus one plain system-style utility face.
color_architecture: Black, white, primary colors, and urgent contrast hits.
imagery_direction: Flash photography, collage, blunt crops, unprecious compositions.
graphic_system: Thick strokes, hard borders, raw boxes, abrupt scale shifts.
application_translation: Strong in posters, social, merch, event graphics, and creator-led launches.

name: Playful Modular Optimism
positioning_match: Education, consumer tech, family brands, and approachable digital products.
logo_approach: Rounded symbol or flexible wordmark with modular building blocks.
typography_recipe: Friendly sans with rounded or soft support typography.
color_architecture: Bright primaries balanced by clean neutrals.
imagery_direction: Illustration-friendly, candid, light-filled, expressive gestures.
graphic_system: Blocks, chips, stickers, playful geometry, repeatable modules.
application_translation: Strong in social systems, educational kits, onboarding assets, and merchandise.

name: Quiet Wellness Soft Neutral
positioning_match: Wellness, skincare, hospitality, and mindful lifestyle brands.
logo_approach: Light wordmark or monoline signature with high reduction clarity.
typography_recipe: Soft serif or low-contrast sans with gentle supporting text system.
color_architecture: Stone, sand, clay, cream, moss, and low-saturation accents.
imagery_direction: Tactile, quiet, airy, natural materials, slow moments.
graphic_system: Whitespace, subtle rules, soft crop windows, gentle repetition.
application_translation: Strong in packaging, notebooks, spa menus, website banners, and slow-content social systems.

name: Sports Kinetic Performance
positioning_match: Sports, fitness, gaming performance, and active lifestyle brands.
logo_approach: Dynamic symbol or angular wordmark built for motion and reduction.
typography_recipe: Condensed sans or wide athletic display paired with a clean utility sans.
color_architecture: High-contrast dark base plus one or two forceful accents.
imagery_direction: Motion blur, action, sweat, directional light, strong physicality.
graphic_system: Slashes, speed lines, motion rails, layered data cues.
application_translation: Strong in apparel, social campaigns, event banners, and launch decks.

name: Monogram Luxury Couture
positioning_match: Fashion, jewelry, prestige beauty, and luxury hospitality.
logo_approach: Monogram-first system with a supporting elegant wordmark.
typography_recipe: High-contrast serif or couture-inspired sans with restrained support typography.
color_architecture: Black, ivory, metallic references, and one rare jewel accent.
imagery_direction: Editorial fashion, texture, shadow, pose, detail, exclusivity.
graphic_system: Monogram repeat, premium framing, disciplined emptiness, deluxe detailing.
application_translation: Strong in packaging, labels, invitations, storefront graphics, and prestige social content.

name: Industrial Technical Systems
positioning_match: Manufacturing, hardware, industrial software, logistics, and technical services.
logo_approach: Hard-edged wordmark or emblem with engineered geometry.
typography_recipe: Technical sans with mono annotations for secondary layers.
color_architecture: Steel neutrals, safety accents, and utility coding colors.
imagery_direction: Machines, materials, infrastructure, workers, controlled realism.
graphic_system: Labels, technical linework, caution logic, bold information hierarchy.
application_translation: Strong in manuals, signage, packaging, equipment decals, and sales decks.

name: Eco Organic Crafted
positioning_match: Food, sustainability, natural products, and value-led consumer goods.
logo_approach: Simple emblem or wordmark with organic edge and strong reduction.
typography_recipe: Warm serif or humanist sans with low-friction supporting typography.
color_architecture: Greens, soil neutrals, clay, oat, and restrained fresh accents.
imagery_direction: Natural light, ingredients, materials, hands, texture, provenance.
graphic_system: Organic shapes, material textures, stamp logic, and grounded layouts.
application_translation: Strong in packaging, labels, menus, tote bags, and community collateral.

name: Climate Infra Future
positioning_match: Climate tech, energy, mobility, and high-impact infrastructure startups.
logo_approach: Confident combination mark or abstract systems symbol with clear wordmark.
typography_recipe: Clean sans with technical support layer and measured emphasis.
color_architecture: Deep blue, energy green, mineral neutrals, and data accents.
imagery_direction: Infrastructure, landscapes, technology, people at scale, future realism.
graphic_system: Flows, grids, system maps, clean lines, operational diagrams.
application_translation: Strong in investor decks, website systems, data visuals, and conference collateral.

name: Experimental Poster Culture
positioning_match: Festivals, galleries, experimental media, and cultural programs.
logo_approach: Flexible typographic identity or concept-led mark system.
typography_recipe: Expressive display face plus plain utility support.
color_architecture: High-contrast pairings or intentionally unusual palettes with discipline.
imagery_direction: Poster energy, collage, experimental crops, visual tension.
graphic_system: Posters, overlays, blocks, image-text friction, bold typographic staging.
application_translation: Strong in event systems, posters, social launches, publications, and motion teasers.

name: Retro Heritage Revival
positioning_match: Food, beverage, hospitality, retail, and founder-led legacy stories.
logo_approach: Badge, custom wordmark, or revival-inspired emblem with disciplined cleanup.
typography_recipe: Vintage-inspired display face with practical supporting sans.
color_architecture: Muted primaries, aged neutrals, heritage accents, and tactile contrast.
imagery_direction: Warm grain, archive references, place, product, human craft.
graphic_system: Frames, badges, stamps, heritage textures, controlled nostalgia.
application_translation: Strong in packaging, menus, storefronts, and collectible collateral.

name: Civic Institutional Trust
positioning_match: Civic, nonprofit, policy, education, and public service brands.
logo_approach: Clear emblem or sober wordmark designed for accessibility and legibility.
typography_recipe: Institutional sans with high-accessibility hierarchy and calm emphasis.
color_architecture: Blue-forward trust system with civic neutrals and one supportive accent.
imagery_direction: Real people, public settings, inclusive framing, documentary realism.
graphic_system: Simple rules, clear panels, accessible typography, informative diagrams.
application_translation: Strong in reports, websites, signage, documents, and large public-facing systems.

name: Creator Bold Persona
positioning_match: Personal brands, studios, media hosts, and founder-led content businesses.
logo_approach: Signature wordmark, monogram, or expressive typographic lockup.
typography_recipe: High-character display face with a sharp support system.
color_architecture: One owning signature color with black, white, and a punch accent.
imagery_direction: Portrait-led, direct, performative, memorable, personality-forward.
graphic_system: Quote frames, punch labels, signature motifs, episodic variations.
application_translation: Strong in social systems, cover art, banners, merch, and keynote materials.

name: Childrens Bright Learning
positioning_match: Kids education, family services, and youth learning products.
logo_approach: Friendly modular mark or cheerful wordmark with clarity at small sizes.
typography_recipe: Friendly sans with high readability and rounded support cues.
color_architecture: Clear bright palette with disciplined primaries and soft neutrals.
imagery_direction: Learning moments, expression, simple illustration, bright real-life scenes.
graphic_system: Shapes, color blocks, sticker logic, educational visual scaffolds.
application_translation: Strong in worksheets, social graphics, packaging, classroom collateral, and events.

name: Fintech Trust Velocity
positioning_match: Fintech, payments, wealth tools, and modern financial products.
logo_approach: Clear wordmark or symbol with decisive geometry and reduction strength.
typography_recipe: Crisp sans system with strong numeric clarity and restrained emphasis.
color_architecture: Deep trust base plus energetic accent and functional state colors.
imagery_direction: Product-led, human confidence, motion without chaos, data realism.
graphic_system: Clean cards, rails, state colors, lightweight data cues, disciplined motion.
application_translation: Strong in product UI, pitch decks, campaigns, and onboarding collateral.

name: Hospitality Sensory Premium
positioning_match: Hotels, restaurants, premium leisure, and experience-driven brands.
logo_approach: Refined wordmark, emblem, or monogram tuned for signage and menus.
typography_recipe: Editorial serif or elegant sans pairing with tactile hierarchy.
color_architecture: Deep hospitality tones, warm neutrals, and one lush accent.
imagery_direction: Atmosphere, material, service moments, light, texture, appetite or comfort.
graphic_system: Menu logic, placemaking cues, tactile dividers, layered pacing.
application_translation: Strong in menus, room collateral, packaging, web banners, and print ephemera.

name: Beauty Ritual Soft Shine
positioning_match: Beauty, skincare, wellness-adjacent ritual, and premium personal care.

color_architecture: Cream, rose, espresso, pearl, and one high-recognition accent.

positioning_match: Architecture, interior design, industrial design, and spatial studios.

imagery_direction: Space, material, shadow, detail, plans, and carefully composed environments.

name: Food Artisan Nostalgic
positioning_match: Bakeries, cafés, packaged food, and local hospitality brands.

graphic_system: Stamps, labels, menu blocks, packaging badges, ingredient cues.

name: B2B Authority Grid

typography_recipe: Crisp sans pair with strong hierarchy for proof, data, and case studies.
color_architecture: Controlled corporate base with one or two modernizing accents.
imagery_direction: People at work, systems, diagrams, product proof, realistic environments.
graphic_system: Case-study modules, proof bars, data cards, disciplined spacing.
application_translation: Strong in websites, decks, white papers, proposals, and thought-leadership collateral.

name: Activist Community Movement
positioning_match: Campaigns, collectives, causes, community programs, and movement brands.
logo_approach: Flexible wordmark or emblem built for rallying, signage, and adaptation.
typography_recipe: Bold display face with clear support system for calls to action.
color_architecture: High-recognition contrast palette built for urgency and accessibility.
imagery_direction: People, participation, signs, streets, gatherings, energy, solidarity.
graphic_system: Posters, placards, stamps, bold framing, chant-like repetition.

name: Luxury Travel Cinematic
positioning_match: Luxury travel, destinations, premium retreats, and high-end experiences.
logo_approach: Elegant wordmark or monogram that scales across hospitality touchpoints.

color_architecture: Deep destination tones, mineral neutrals, and rich atmospheric accents.
imagery_direction: Cinematic landscape, ritual, texture, service, transport, atmosphere.
graphic_system: Editorial pacing, immersive imagery, refined navigation cues, cinematic cropping.

name: Medical Human Clarity
positioning_match: Medical, diagnostics, care services, and health systems.
logo_approach: Clear symbol or wordmark that stays legible in low-res and regulated contexts.
typography_recipe: Readable sans system with strict accessibility and hierarchy discipline.
color_architecture: Clean healthcare base with calm support colors and clear state logic.
imagery_direction: Care settings, professionals, patients, tools, light, confidence, calm realism.
graphic_system: Information panels, simple icons, high-contrast cues, wayfinding-ready patterns.
application_translation: Strong in patient materials, signage, websites, reports, and service collateral.

name: SaaS Crisp Product
positioning_match: SaaS, productivity, AI tools, and digital business products.
logo_approach: Clean wordmark or reduction-friendly symbol with product-ready proportions.
typography_recipe: Systematic sans hierarchy designed for UI and marketing parity.
color_architecture: Neutral product base with one primary accent and one support accent.
imagery_direction: UI captures, workflow scenes, crisp product moments, lightweight abstraction.
graphic_system: Product cards, feature blocks, icons, state colors, crisp templates.
application_translation: Strong in launch pages, deck covers, social explainers, docs, and lifecycle assets.

name: East-West Cultural Tech
positioning_match: Cross-cultural tech, global consumer brands, and bilingual or transnational ventures.
logo_approach: Balanced wordmark or hybrid symbol system with strong cultural restraint.
typography_recipe: Sans system selected for multilingual harmony with optional editorial support.
color_architecture: Modern base with one culturally resonant accent family used intentionally.
imagery_direction: People, cities, products, and cultural references handled with precision not stereotype.
graphic_system: Pattern logic, bilingual pacing, modular cultural references, high clarity.
application_translation: Strong in packaging, global websites, social, retail collateral, and launch campaigns.

name: Mascot Geometric Play
positioning_match: Consumer products, events, communities, playful retail, and character-led brands.
logo_approach: Simple mascot or icon system paired with a strong wordmark.

color_architecture: High-recognition color set with one signature dominant and a clean support palette.
imagery_direction: Character-forward, expressive, cheerful, repeatable across assets.
graphic_system: Character poses, badges, stickers, shape modules, repeatable scenes.

name: Quiet Editorial Intelligence
positioning_match: Research, advisory, cultural media, and insight-led brands.
logo_approach: Wordmark-forward with subtle intelligence cues and strong typographic finish.
typography_recipe: Editorial serif or literary sans pairing with disciplined support text.
color_architecture: Ink neutrals, paper tones, and one measured accent.
imagery_direction: Portraits, documents, spaces, detail, slow editorial framing.
graphic_system: Columns, pull quotes, quiet rules, literary rhythm, evidence-led pacing.

name: Clean DTC Utility
positioning_match: Direct-to-consumer brands, practical products, and conversion-focused commerce.
logo_approach: Straightforward wordmark or icon-wordmark with high recognition.
typography_recipe: Modern sans hierarchy optimized for commerce and quick scanning.
color_architecture: Neutral base, one owning brand color, and practical support accents.
imagery_direction: Product-in-use, lifestyle realism, clean e-commerce framing.
graphic_system: Simple cards, benefit labels, comparison blocks, clear CTA space.

name: Founder Led Trust Story
positioning_match: Studios, consultancies, expert services, and relationship-led businesses.
logo_approach: Wordmark or signature-led system with refined support mark if needed.
typography_recipe: Confident serif or sans pairing that balances expertise with warmth.
color_architecture: Professional base with one signature founder-led accent tone.
imagery_direction: Founder presence, process, conversations, real working context, proof.
graphic_system: Case-study modules, quote frames, signature cues, simple editorial structure.
application_translation: Strong in proposals, websites, decks, documents, and thoughtful social series.

name: Premium Retail Graphic
positioning_match: Retail, pop-up brands, consumer launches, and display-driven commerce.
logo_approach: Recognition-first mark system built for packaging and shelf distance.
typography_recipe: Display-led headline system with practical retail support type.
color_architecture: Shelf-visible dominant color with disciplined support palette.
imagery_direction: Product hero, display context, tactile materials, shopper attention.
graphic_system: Shelf blocks, campaign stamps, packaging codes, promo-ready modules.
application_translation: Strong in packaging, POS, retail signage, social launches, and merch kits.

name: Minimal Tech Luxury
positioning_match: Premium devices, design-forward software, mobility, and high-end product brands.
logo_approach: Reduction-driven mark or wordmark with premium finish and strong geometry.
typography_recipe: Minimal sans system with subtle editorial moments and restrained weights.
color_architecture: Monochrome or dark mineral base with one precise accent.
imagery_direction: Product hero, surfaces, shadow, reflection, premium restraint.
graphic_system: Large fields, refined lines, high finish, product-first spacing.

color_architecture: Warm neutrals with one trust color and one calm secondary accent.
